response.justification: Bogdan has extensive senior-level software engineering experience, including building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective) and high-scale, low-latency microservices. However, his recent tech stack heavily favors TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his C/C++ experience dating back to 2014-2015 and no Rust experience listed. While his domain knowledge in GIS and distributed systems is highly relevant, the lack of recent modern C++ or Rust proficiency makes him a borderline candidate for this specific role.
strengths: Strong domain experience in geospatial data processing through founding and developing GISCollective.
Proven ability to build highly scalable, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Extensive senior-level engineering experience with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary required technologies.
No direct experience mentioned with navigation systems or routing tile generation, only general GIS mapping.
Recent roles heavily focus on web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than lower-level data pipelines.
